DATA VISUALIZATION / 数据可视化

从8千亿到308亿

数字里的非遗"出圈"与"出海" From 806.5 Billion to 30.8 Billion: ICH Going Viral & Going Global

黄伊铌 · 王雅婷 · 秦蕴珊 Huang Yini · Wang Yating · Qin Yunshan

0
抖音非遗播放量 Douyin ICH Plays
0
TikTok非遗播放量 TikTok ICH Plays
0
抖音每秒观看 / TikTok每秒观看 Views per Second
Part 01

总览：两个世界的声量对比 Overview: Volume Comparison Across Two Worlds

抖音平台上非遗相关内容的累计播放量高达8065亿次，而TikTok上海外用户对中国非遗内容的累计播放量也达到了308亿次。两个数字之间，是国内与海外传播的巨大声量鸿沟，也是未来出海的巨大潜力空间。 Douyin's ICH content has accumulated over 806.5 billion plays, while TikTok's overseas ICH content has reached 30.8 billion plays. The gap represents both a challenge and enormous potential for global expansion.

0亿
抖音非遗累计播放量Douyin ICH Total Plays
0亿
TikTok非遗累计播放量TikTok ICH Total Plays
0: 1
抖音与TikTok播放量之比Douyin vs TikTok Play Ratio
Part 02

年轻化：Z世代既是消费者，也是创作者 Youth: Gen Z as Both Consumers and Creators

非遗传播正在经历一场深刻的"年轻化"转型。00后用户增长率高达86%，创作者数量增长65%。62%的千万级爆款视频由00后发布，年轻一代正在用自己的方式重新定义非遗的传播方式。 ICH dissemination is undergoing a profound "youth-ization." Post-00s user growth reached 86%, creator growth 65%. 62% of hit videos with over 10M views were posted by Gen Z.

0
00后用户增长Post-00s User Growth
0
00后创作者增长Post-00s Creator Growth
0
千万爆款由00后发布10M+ Hit Videos by Gen Z

年轻创作者正在将非遗从"博物馆里的展品"转变为"日常生活中的潮流内容"，让传统技艺以全新的面貌进入大众视野。 Young creators are transforming ICH from "museum exhibits" into "trending content in daily life," bringing traditional crafts to the public with a fresh face.

Part 03

海外传播：中国非遗的全球化之路 Global Spread: The Road to ICH Globalization

在TikTok上，中国武术以222亿次播放量遥遥领先，传统手工艺、中国美食、民族舞蹈紧随其后。创作者来自全球各地，真正实现了"文化出海"。 On TikTok, Chinese martial arts leads with 22.2 billion plays, followed by traditional crafts, Chinese cuisine, and folk dance. Creators from around the world are driving "cultural globalization."

Part 04

消费转化：非遗不只是"看"，更是"买" Commercial Conversion: ICH is Not Just "Watched" but "Bought"

从8065亿播放到3亿消费者实际购买，短视频平台正在构建一条完整的非遗消费链路。直播带货、兴趣电商的兴起，让非遗产品找到了从展示到交易的转化路径。 From 806.5 billion plays to 300 million actual buyers, short video platforms are building a complete ICH consumption chain. Livestream commerce and interest-based e-commerce have opened the path from display to transaction.

8065亿次播放量中，约127亿次进入直播间产生兴趣，其中3.8亿次转化为购买意向，最终约3亿消费者完成非遗产品购买，其中92%为国内市场，8%为海外市场。 Out of 806.5B plays, ~12.7B entered livestreams with interest, 380M showed purchase intent, and ~300M consumers completed ICH product purchases (92% domestic, 8% overseas).

Part 05

展望：双轨并行的未来 Outlook: A Future on Dual Tracks

抖音8065亿、快手1780亿、TikTok587亿 -- 三大平台共同构建了中国非遗的数字传播生态。与此同时，中国在UNESCO非遗名录中的项目从2001年的1项增长到2026年的44项，位居世界第一。 Douyin 806.5B, Kuaishou 178B, TikTok 58.7B -- three platforms collectively build China's ICH digital ecosystem. Meanwhile, China's UNESCO ICH listings grew from 1 in 2001 to 44 in 2026, ranking No.1 worldwide.

从"传统态"到"日常态"、从"年轻态"到"国际范"，中国非遗正在数字时代的浪潮中焕发新生。未来的故事，才刚刚开始。 From "traditional" to "everyday," from "youthful" to "international," Chinese ICH is being revitalized in the digital wave. The story has only just begun.

数据来源 / Data Sources All data sourced from the following reports and publications

  1. 中国传媒大学非遗传播研究中心《抖音非遗创新发展趋势报告》(2026年4月)
    参考来源页 Reference
  2. 文旅产业指数实验室《2022年非物质文化遗产海外短视频影响力报告》
    参考来源页 Reference
  3. 快手《2025快手非遗生态报告》(2025年6月)
    参考来源页 Reference
  4. 人民日报：中国UNESCO非遗项目44项世界第一
    参考来源页 Reference
  5. UNESCO官网：非物质文化遗产名录
    UNESCO ICH Lists
